journeys.description: Managed Ubuntu servers (LEMP, Grafana) and full-stack deployments (PM2, Nginx). Designed and developed backend (Express, MySQL) & frontend (React, Next, React Native) architectures for IoT microsleep detectors, LMS, and other management applications.

Progressed from NodeMCU Division to Web Dev Intern, and Coordinator Software for IoT. Managed on-site hardware integration, hybrid web platforms, and lab operations. Earned 'Sertif SG IoT' certification.
Developed RESTful APIs using ExpressJS & MySQL. Built the company profile website using ReactJS. Managed Ubuntu 20.04 servers (LEMP stack).

Developed various applications including library management systems, e-commerce platforms, hotel bookings, and laundry services using HTML, CSS, Native PHP, ReactJS, TailwindCSS, ExpressJS, and MySQL.

projects.title: EHydroTel - Smart Hydroponic IoT
projects.description: An end-to-end smart IoT ecosystem designed to monitor, control, and automate hydroponic farming systems using microservices architecture.
projects.background: Automated hydroponic monitoring and control via IoT edge devices and a real-time dashboard platform.
projects.impact: Improved data querying performance and enabled 24/7 autonomous monitoring.

projects.title: UKT Pencak Silat Information System
projects.description: An integrated exam management platform (UKT) to digitalize registration, theory tests, and real-time practical assessments for martial arts.
projects.background: A comprehensive digital platform for managing belt promotion exams, from theory tests to live practical assessments.
projects.impact: Eliminated paper-based scoring and data entry bottlenecks for hundreds of students.

projects.title: NADI - Smart IoT Drainage System
projects.description: An intelligent IoT hardware system using ESP32-CAM to monitor drainage capacity and provide early flood warnings via real-time telemetry.
projects.background: An intelligent IoT hardware system using ESP32-CAM to monitor drainage capacity and provide early flood warnings via real-time telemetry.
projects.impact: Early detection of flooding through automated water level monitoring and image analysis, providing real-time alerts to prevent potential disasters.

projects.title: Pencak Silat Digital Scoring
projects.description: A web-based digital scoring system for Pencak Silat matches. Designed the REST API backend architecture to ensure high accuracy and fast scoring input.

projects.title: SyariShop - Modern E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A scalable multi-app e-commerce platform with dedicated interfaces for Customers and Merchants, optimizing user experience and shop management.

projects.title: OPD Planning & Monitoring API
projects.description: A RESTful API for digitalizing planning workflows, real-time performance indicator tracking, and secure evidence archiving for government agencies.

projects.title: Toko Telyu - E-Commerce Mobile App
projects.description: A full-stack cross-platform e-commerce mobile application built with Flutter, featuring an AI chatbot and a real-time Firebase backend.

projects.title: Integrated MSME Management System
projects.description: A comprehensive mini-ERP platform designed for MSMEs, combining a Laravel backend with a Flutter mobile app for real-time inventory and financial tracking.
